probes.question: What is the maximum block size in bytes seen in the last hour on mainnet?
What is the average block arrival time in milliseconds over the last hour on mainnet?
What is the average block arrival time broken down by consensus client implementation over the last hour on mainnet?
What is the average gas used per block over the last hour on mainnet?
How many orphaned blocks have there been in the last 24 hours on mainnet?
How many slots were missed (had no block proposed) in the last 24 hours on mainnet?
What is the current finalized epoch distance on mainnet? This is the gap between the head epoch and the finalized epoch.

agreement.finding: 4/5 used beacon_api_eth_v1_events_finalized_checkpoint, beacon_api_eth_v1_events_head; 1/5 used beacon_api_eth_v1_events_finalized_checkpoint, beacon_api_eth_v1_events_head, latest_finalized, latest_head

probes.question: How many active validators are there currently on mainnet?
What is the distribution of validator statuses (active_ongoing, exited, pending, etc.) on mainnet?
What is the attestation agreement percentage for the last hour on mainnet? Agreement means what fraction of attestations pointed to the same beacon block root.
What is the p95 attestation propagation time in milliseconds over the last hour on mainnet?
What is the attestation participation rate for the most recent epoch on mainnet?
What is the head attestation correctness percentage over the last 6 hours on mainnet? This measures what fraction of attesters voted for the correct head.

agreement.finding: 3/5 used fct_attestation_correctness_head; 1/5 used (no tables); 1/5 used fct_attestation_correctness_canonical, fct_attestation_correctness_head

probes.question: Which staking entities have the lowest attestation liveness over the last 24 hours on mainnet? Show the top 10 worst performers.
What is the average number of validators per included attestation on mainnet over the last hour?
How many blobs were included in blocks in the last hour on mainnet?
Which addresses submitted the most blobs in the last 24 hours on mainnet? Show the top 10.
What is the average number of blobs per slot over the last hour on mainnet?
How many chain reorgs have been detected in the last 24 hours on mainnet?
What is the market share of each MEV relay by number of blocks delivered in the last 24 hours on mainnet?
Who are the top 10 MEV builders by total bid value in ETH over the last 24 hours on mainnet?
What is the distribution of MEV bid values in ETH (min, p50, p95, max) over the last hour on mainnet?

agreement.finding: 3/5 used fct_mev_bid_value, mev_relay_bid_trace; 1/5 used fct_block_mev_head, fct_mev_bid_value; 1/5 used fct_mev_bid_value

probes.question: How many unique validators have registered with each MEV relay in the last 24 hours on mainnet?
What is the gossipsub duplication factor for aggregate attestation messages on mainnet over the last hour? This is the ratio of total messages to unique aggregates.
What is the p95 aggregate and proof propagation time from slot start in milliseconds on mainnet over the last hour?

agreement.finding: 3/5 used libp2p_gossipsub_aggregate_and_proof; 1/5 used (no tables); 1/5 used beacon_api_eth_v1_events_contribution_and_proof, libp2p_gossipsub_aggregate_and_proof

probes.question: What is the average number of committees per slot on mainnet?
How many active Xatu sentry nodes are there on mainnet broken down by consensus client implementation?

agreement.finding: 3/5 used fct_node_active_last_24h; 1/5 used fct_node_active_last_24h, node_record_consensus, node_record_execution, system.databases; 1/5 used (no tables)

probes.question: What is the distribution of Xatu sentry nodes by country on mainnet? Show the top 10 countries.
For the last hour on mainnet, is there a correlation between late block arrivals (blocks arriving after 4 seconds into the slot) and lower attestation participation in the following slot?
Compare the top 5 staking entities on mainnet by both attestation liveness and head correctness over the last 24 hours.

agreement.finding: 3/5 used fct_attestation_correctness_by_entity_head, fct_attestation_liveness_by_entity_head; 1/5 used ethseer_validator_entity, fct_attestation_correctness_by_entity_head, fct_attestation_correctness_by_validator_head, fct_attestation_liveness_by_entity_head; 1/5 used fct_attestation_correctness_by_entity_head, fct_attestation_correctness_by_validator_head, fct_attestation_liveness_by_entity_head

probes.question: Who is posting empty blobs (blobs containing zero data) to Ethereum mainnet? Show the top submitters by count.

agreement.finding: 4/5 used canonical_beacon_blob_sidecar, dim_block_blob_submitter; 1/5 used canonical_beacon_blob_sidecar, canonical_beacon_block, dim_block_blob_submitter

probes.question: Do community staking operators (Lido CSM, Rocketpool, Solo Stakers) see worse head vote accuracy as blob counts increase on mainnet?

agreement.finding: 3/5 used ethseer_validator_entity, fct_attestation_correctness_by_validator_head, fct_block_blob_count_head; 1/5 used (no tables); 1/5 used fct_attestation_correctness_by_entity_head, fct_block_blob_count_head

probes.question: Does having a high peer count (6k+ peers) give an Ethereum node a significant advantage in seeing blocks first on mainnet?

agreement.finding: 2/5 used (no tables); 1/5 used fct_block_first_seen_by_node, libp2p_connected, libp2p_gossipsub_beacon_block; 1/5 used libp2p_connected; 1/5 used fct_block_first_seen_by_node, libp2p_connected

probes.question: Which staking entities delay their blocks to extract more MEV on mainnet? Show median block arrival time by entity.

agreement.finding: 2/5 used fct_block_first_seen_by_node, fct_block_proposer_entity; 1/5 used fct_block_first_seen_by_node, fct_block_mev_head, fct_block_proposer_entity, fct_prepared_block; 1/5 used fct_block_first_seen_by_node, fct_block_mev_head, fct_block_proposer_entity; 1/5 used (no tables)

probes.question: How often do Ethereum proposers build on a genuinely stale parent (not just missed slots) on mainnet? Show the distribution of parent distances.
How many peer_ids and consensus clients share the same IPv4 address on Ethereum mainnet?
Which EVM precompiles consume the most gas on Ethereum mainnet? Rank them by total gas consumed in the last 24 hours.
How does blob mempool propagation affect engine_getBlobs success rates on mainnet? What fraction of getBlobs calls return SUCCESS vs EMPTY?

agreement.finding: 3/5 used fct_engine_get_blobs_by_slot, libp2p_gossipsub_blob_sidecar; 1/5 used fct_engine_get_blobs_by_slot; 1/5 used fct_engine_get_blobs_by_el_client, fct_engine_get_blobs_by_slot, libp2p_gossipsub_blob_sidecar

probes.question: Why was the block at slot 13505944 orphaned on mainnet despite having a valid payload with 909 transactions and 21 blobs? When did nodes first see it?

agreement.finding: 4/5 used fct_block, fct_block_first_seen_by_node; 1/5 used fct_block, fct_block_blob_count, fct_block_first_seen_by_node

probes.question: How does block arrival time correlate with the number of blobs in a block on mainnet over the last hour?
